message:
feat(tldr): add tool comparison mode and vim-style keyboard navigation

Two interconnected features for the TL;DR flywheel tools page:

1. Compare Mode (select up to 3 tools for side-by-side comparison):
   - New compare toggle button with GitCompare icon in the grid header
   - When active, cards show a selectable checkbox overlay with checkmark
     indicator and accessible aria-labels ("Add/Remove X from comparison")
   - Floating pill at bottom of viewport shows selection count (N of 3)
     with animated entrance/exit via AnimatePresence
   - "Compare" button appears once 2+ tools selected, opening a BottomSheet
     with a structured comparison table covering: description, GitHub stars,
     tech stack, key features (top 3), and synergy links
   - Synergies highlight which compared tools connect to each other with
     violet ring badges and checkmark indicators
   - exitCompareMode() cleanly resets all state (compareIds, showComparison)
   - Mobile tap disabled during compare mode to avoid conflicting gestures

2. Vim-style Keyboard Navigation (j/k/Enter/g shortcuts):
   - j/ArrowDown and k/ArrowUp cycle focus through filtered tool cards with
     smooth scroll-into-view (respects reducedMotion preference)
   - Focused card highlighted with violet ring-2 / border styling
   - Enter opens detail bottom sheet for the focused tool
   - g opens the focused tool's GitHub link in a new tab
   - "/" still focuses search; Escape clears search AND resets focus
   - All shortcuts disabled when cursor is in an input/textarea

Supporting changes:
- TldrToolCard: export DynamicIcon for reuse in comparison table headers;
  add isFocused, isCompareMode, isSelectedForCompare, onToggleCompare props
  with corresponding visual states and overlay button
- Beads issue tracker synced with current state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
